sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ الدَّوْلِيِّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na međunarodni aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the international airport early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِخَتْمِ جَوَازِ سَفَرِي.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam do pasoške kontrole kako bih pečatirao svoj pasoš.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the passport office to stamp my passport.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ حِزَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga sam čekao svoju torbu na traci za prtljag.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I waited for my bag at the luggage belt.

sentences.translation: Aerodrom je bio veoma krcat putnicima.
sentences.translationEn: The airport was very crowded with travelers.

sentences.arabic: أَخِيرًا، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju sam uzeo taksi da odem do hotela.
sentences.translationEn: Finally, I took a taxi to go to the hotel.
